title: The Iron in Your Blood Came From a Dying Star — The Qur'an Said It Was 'Sent Down'
_note: CINEMATIC, hook-first, 60s+. Footage = molten-abstract/galaxy/sun/meteor/earth (no humans; verified; foundry clips avoided). NO recital; voice speaks English. SOURCE: Surah Al-Hadid 57:25. SCIENCE: iron forms by fusion in massive stars; iron fusion is endothermic and triggers core-collapse → supernova scatters iron; Earth's iron is cosmic; iron-60 isotope on Earth/Moon proves extraterrestrial delivery. Surah 57 is literally named 'The Iron' (a fact, no numerology). Safe-zone, legible captions.

segments.text: The iron in your blood, in your phone, in this whole planet, did not come from Earth. And the Quran hinted at this fourteen hundred years ago.
The Quran says iron was, quote, sent down.
For centuries, that was a strange way to describe a metal we dig out of the ground.
Then science found where iron really comes from. It cannot be made on Earth. It is forged inside giant stars.
And iron is special. It is so heavy that making it actually drains a star's energy. Iron is the metal that finally kills the star.
In the star's dying explosion, that iron is blasted across the universe. Billions of years ago, some of it landed here.
Every piece of iron you have ever touched was once inside a star, and fell from the sky.
The Quran even named an entire chapter after it. Surah Al-Hadid. The Iron.
And We sent down iron, in which is great strength, and benefits for the people.
Sent down. Exactly as the Quran said.

sources: Qur'an, Surah Al-Hadid 57:25 — 'and We sent down iron, wherein is great might and benefits for the people.'

Science: iron is produced by fusion in massive stars; iron fusion is endothermic and triggers core-collapse supernovae, which scatter iron through space. Earth's iron is of cosmic origin; iron-60 found on Earth/Moon confirms extraterrestrial delivery.
Surah 57 is named Al-Hadid ('The Iron') — stated as a simple fact, with NO numerology claims.
Qur'an 57:25 shown Arabic + English; not recited. All Pexels clips verified human-free (foundry clips avoided to prevent any worker appearing).
